text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't believe I got hurt during training...
choice_data_list: We'll be more careful next time.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't worry! It only hurts a little! I'll be fit as a
fiddle in no time!
choice_data_list: Overdoing it isn't going to help.
Overdoing it isn't going to help.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ngh... You're right. I should take it easy.

After I tend to her, we agree to take the rest of
the day off, just to be safe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I was a little too eager to become the top
Umamusume in all of Japan...

After I tend to her, we agree to take the rest of
the day off, just to be safe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...I'm not going to be discouraged by something
like this.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My mom always said that an injury is a child's
badge of honor.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So I'm sure that this injury will become a badge
that shows how hard I worked to become the best
in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty, I'll focus on recovery so I can start
training again!

After tending to Special Week's injury, I follow
her wishes, and we continue our training.
